name: Toasted Amaranth Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the oil, honey/maple syrup, and salt (if using).
2. Add yeast to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Gradually add amaranth flour and whole wheat flour, stirring continuously until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Spread the dough with butter and sprinkle with raisins, cinnamon, chopped nuts, dried lemon peel, and toasted amaranth seeds (toast in a dry skillet until lightly browned).
6. Roll up the dough into rolls about 2 inches thick.
7. Place the rolls close together on an oiled pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes.
